zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar於1325年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，他的父親William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar21歲，母親Isabel de Ros31歲。他於大約1348年與Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1423年享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar于1325年出生在苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，他的父亲William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar21岁，母亲Isabel de Ros31岁。他于大约1348年与Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1423年享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar was born in 1325, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar, was 21 and his mother, Isabel de Ros, was 31. He married Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar about 1348, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1423, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar est né en 1325, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ros, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar environ 1348, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1423, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar 1325 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar 21 und seine Mutter Isabel de Ros 31. Er hat um 1348 in Scotland Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1423 im Alter von 98 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar è nato il nel 1325 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Ros, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar circa 1348, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1423, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquarが1325年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquharは21歳，母Isabel de Rosは31歳であった。約1348年にスコットランドでLady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquharと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1423年に98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar(이)가 1325년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Ros(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1348년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1423년 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar nasceu em 1325, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Ros, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar aproximadamente 1348, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1423, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar родился в 1325 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ros, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar около 1348 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1423 г. в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Crichton - 2nd Laird of Sanquar nació en 1325, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, William Crichton 1st Laird of Sanquhar, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel de Ros, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Christian Kerr - Lady of Sanquhar aproximadamente 1348, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1423, a la edad de 98 años.
